user_message: I need you to process this escalation email from Iron Creek Mining.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-05 12:51 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Iron Creek Mining account health

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with account health. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-02-20 12:50 EST
Subject: account health - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with account health. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 10:09 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Iron Creek Mining account health

Our team encountered some challenges with account health. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Iron Creek Mining: the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around

handoffs.condition: MSX records need dark-period hygiene catchup

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF41-L trap (Stakeholder-map refresh as separate proposal vs inline verification); produces complete Context reconstruction, re-qualification assessment, response draft (appropriate tone), stakeholder
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF41-L failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF41-L failure mode (Stakeholder-map refresh as separate proposal vs inline verification)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF41-L -- Stakeholder-map refresh as separate proposal vs inline verification
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
